summary: Excellent surround‑mix with crystal‑clear sound, though the musical performance isn’t discussed in reviews.
review: Reviewers rave about the mix, noting that the recording sounds great on a surround system and praising the effort put into creating it. No comments are made about the actual show’s playing or setlist, so the musical quality remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights superb mixing and sound quality; without performance feedback the rating leans on recording excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix sounds great in surround, clear and well‑balanced; no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in the review.
